description: A White House card built on a news-style layout. The top is a white band carrying the 'SCRIPPS NEWS' logo (blue and navy) and a black serif headline reading verbatim: 'President Trump to celebrate small business owners.' The main image below is a color photograph shot from behind President Trump (in a dark navy suit) as he stands on a stage facing a large crowd in an arena; the crowd holds blue and white signs (legible 'LOWER PRICES' placards and red hats) and the stage front is draped in red, white, and blue bunting with white stars. At the bottom right is the small white line-art White House emblem with the engraved 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON' wordmark. Per the tweet, Trump is hosting 130+ small-business leaders.
notable_text: SCRIPPS NEWS | President Trump to celebrate small business owners | THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
